skills.name: Speed Boost I
skills.description: Increases your base speed.
skills.info_description: The first step to mastering your velocity.

skills.name: Speed Boost II
skills.description: Further increases your base speed.
skills.info_description: You begin to move with more confidence and celerity.

skills.name: Kinetic Buildup
skills.description: Sprinting builds kinetic energy.
skills.info_description: Specialize in Kinetic energy.

skills.name: Kinetic Release
skills.description: Release kinetic energy in a damaging burst.
skills.info_description: Unleashes stored kinetic energy as a close-range blast.

skills.name: Overwhelming Force
skills.description: Your kinetic abilities have increased knockback.
skills.info_description: All abilities that knock enemies back do so with greater force.

skills.name: Infinite Mass Punch
skills.description: A devastating high-mass punch.
skills.info_description: After sprinting a long distance, your next punch deals massive damage.

skills.name: Static Buildup
skills.description: Sprinting builds up static electricity.
skills.info_description: Specialize in Static energy.

skills.name: Lightning Throw
skills.description: Hurl a bolt of concentrated lightning.
skills.info_description: Consumes all static charge to throw a powerful lightning bolt.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Your lightning bolt can jump to multiple targets.
skills.info_description: After hitting its primary target, your lightning will chain to a nearby enemy.

skills.name: Ride the Lightning
skills.description: Teleport to your lightning strikes.
skills.info_description: Activating this ability after throwing lightning will teleport you to its impact point.

skills.name: Speed Boost III
skills.description: A significant enhancement to your speed.
skills.info_description: The world starts to feel a little slower.

skills.name: Speed Boost IV
skills.description: Your speed begins to warp the air around you.
skills.info_description: You leave a faint trail of displaced air in your wake.

skills.name: Phasing
skills.description: Vibrate through solid matter.
skills.info_description: Allows you to pass through 1-block thick walls made of simple materials.

skills.name: Phase Assault
skills.description: Your next attack after phasing deals bonus damage.
skills.info_description: For a short time after phasing, your melee attacks bypass armor.

skills.name: Speed Boost V
skills.description: You are a blur of motion.
skills.info_description: Objects appear to streak by as you move.

skills.name: Speed Mirage
skills.description: Create a short-lived afterimage to distract enemies.
skills.info_description: Specialize in Evasion.

skills.name: Afterimage Addition
skills.description: You can now create an additional afterimage.
skills.info_description: Increases the maximum number of active mirages by one.

skills.name: Unseen Reflexes
skills.description: You have a chance to dodge melee attacks.
skills.info_description: Grants a small passive chance to completely avoid a melee attack.

skills.name: Momentum Control
skills.description: Gain better control over your movement.
skills.info_description: Specialize in Momentum.

skills.name: Wall Kick
skills.description: Jump off of walls to gain height.
skills.info_description: Allows you to perform an extra jump when next to a wall.

skills.name: Ground Slam
skills.description: Slam into the ground from a great height.
skills.info_description: Falling from a height and activating this ability will create a shockwave on impact.

skills.name: Air Dash
skills.description: Perform a short dash in the air.
skills.info_description: Grants a short burst of momentum in the direction you are looking.

skills.name: Speed Boost VI
skills.description: The sound barrier is a suggestion.
skills.info_description: A faint hum is audible as you approach top speed.

skills.name: Speed Boost VII
skills.description: You move faster than thought.
skills.info_description: Your perception accelerates to match your speed.

skills.name: Speed Boost VIII
skills.description: Become a living current of the Speed Force.
skills.info_description: You have reached the pinnacle of raw speed.

skills.name: Accelerated Metabolism I
skills.description: Your metabolism grants resistance to negative effects.
skills.info_description: Tier 1: Your body processes substances rapidly, making you resistant to poison and hunger.

skills.name: Accelerated Metabolism II
skills.description: Your metabolism burns through beneficial potions faster.
skills.info_description: Tier 2: Increased resistance, but beneficial potion effects have a shorter duration.

skills.name: Accelerated Metabolism III
skills.description: Your metabolism purges all foreign substances.
skills.info_description: Tier 3: Maximum resistance, but beneficial potion effects are significantly weakened.

skills.name: Speed Healing I
skills.description: Your accelerated healing factor begins to manifest.
skills.info_description: Tier 1: Slowly regenerate health over time.

skills.name: Speed Healing II
skills.description: Your wounds close noticeably faster.
skills.info_description: Tier 2: Increased health regeneration.

skills.name: Speed Healing III
skills.description: You can recover from grievous injuries in moments.
skills.info_description: Tier 3: Maximum health regeneration.

skills.name: Rapid Construction
skills.description: You can place blocks at incredible speeds.
skills.info_description: Dramatically increases your building speed.

skills.name: Vibrational Tuning
skills.description: Shatter certain blocks by vibrating at their resonant frequency.
skills.info_description: Allows you to shatter blocks like glass or stone by vibrating.

skills.name: Unseen Movement
skills.description: Become harder for mobs to detect while sprinting.
skills.info_description: Effectively grants a form of temporary invisibility while sprinting.

skills.name: Vortex Generation
skills.description: Create a vortex by running in a circle.
skills.info_description: Pulls enemies into the center or deflects incoming projectiles.

skills.name: Speed Steal
skills.description: Steal speed from your enemies.
skills.info_description: Creates a cone effect in front of you that dramatically slows any enemies caught within it.

skills.name: Cyclone
skills.description: Spin at incredible speeds to create a powerful cyclone.
skills.info_description: Pulls in and damages nearby enemies. Mutually exclusive with Supersonic Punch.

skills.name: Supersonic Punch
skills.description: Unleash a punch that breaks the sound barrier.
skills.info_description: Creates a devastating sonic boom in a cone in front of you. Mutually exclusive with Cyclone.

skills.name: Kinetic Redirection
skills.description: Absorb incoming projectiles to empower your next attack.
skills.info_description: Chance to convert incoming projectile damage into kinetic energy for your next Kinetic Release.

skills.name: Residual Charge
skills.description: Lightning attacks leave a damaging electrical field.
skills.info_description: Your lightning attacks leave behind a damaging field of energy.

skills.name: Frictionless Aura
skills.description: Run up walls and slide on ice.
skills.info_description: Allows for short wall runs and extended slides on ice.

skills.name: Cratering Impact
skills.description: Your Ground Slam kicks up damaging debris.
skills.info_description: Increases the damage and radius of Ground Slam.

skills.name: Time Dilation
skills.description: Begin to break the temporal barrier.
skills.info_description: Unlocks the ability to manipulate your own timeline through time travel.

skills.name: Temporal Redo
skills.description: Travel back in time to prevent recent injury.
skills.info_description: Travels back to your position from 3 seconds ago, effectively erasing any damage taken in that time.

skills.name: Improved Redo
skills.description: Travel further back in your timeline.
skills.info_description: Increases the duration of Temporal Redo to 5 seconds.

skills.name: Time Remnant
skills.description: Pull a version of yourself from another timeline to aid you.
skills.info_description: Summons a short-lived temporal duplicate of yourself that will fight for you.

skills.name: Lingering Remnant
skills.description: Your time remnants last longer.
skills.info_description: Increases the duration of your Time Remnants.

skills.name: Temporal Strike
skills.description: Strike an enemy out of the current timestream.
skills.info_description: Hit an enemy so fast they are briefly knocked out of sync with time, stunning them.

skills.name: Chronal Barrage
skills.description: Unleash a flurry of strikes from different points in time.
skills.info_description: Hits a single target multiple times in an instant.
